overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through a neon-lit, foggy Night City street at night. The character exits a modern building and runs along wet sidewalks lined with palm trees and holographic billboards, eventually crossing a street to approach a large futuristic structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern building entrance transitioning to outdoor sidewalk

events.description: character exits through glass doors from interior to the foggy neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: moving from building interior to exterior sidewalk, transitioning from walking to running

entered.detail: large glass doors with metallic frames marking the building exit
rectangular concrete planter with small tree and ground lighting
dark paneled exterior wall of the modern building
small circular lights embedded in the sidewalk illuminating the path
wet asphalt street with neon reflections visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene begins inside a modern building looking out through glass doors into a red-lit interior. The character exits onto a landscaped sidewalk with recessed lighting, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the foggy neon-lit urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree lined urban sidewalk with elevated highway

events.description: character accelerates from walking to running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the sidewalk past street lights and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk
futuristic car driving along the street with headlights cutting through fog

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk with fronds visible against the foggy sky
massive elevated highway structure with glowing blue accent lights spanning across the street
large digital advertising screens displaying animated content on building facades
tall building with reflective glass windows and neon trim lighting
tall street lamps casting pools of light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing by modern glass buildings and holographic billboards. An elevated highway overpass looms ahead with distinctive blue lighting, while sparse traffic and occasional pedestrians share the foggy neon-lit street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian walkway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: running past digital billboards and a newsstand kiosk along the palm-lined path

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the pathway moving in the same direction

entered.detail: large prominent billboard with bright pink neon text advertising a show
futuristic kiosk structure with illuminated displays and neon trim
multiple glowing advertisement panels showing various products and media
skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the foggy night sky

segments.scene_description: Running along a tiled pedestrian walkway flanked by palm trees, the character passes a futuristic newsstand kiosk and prominent digital billboards including a large pink neon advertisement. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights of the surrounding commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalk and futuristic stadium-like building

events.description: character crosses the street at a yellow striped crosswalk while vehicles pass by
approaching the entrance of a large building with distinctive sloped roof and vertical lighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching a large futuristic building with an illuminated sloped roof structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic SUV driving through the intersection with brake lights glowing

entered.detail: bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
massive building with distinctive sloped roof featuring multiple vertical light strips
futuristic traffic signal pole with illuminated walk/don't walk displays
dark building entrance with glowing cyan accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection marked with yellow crosswalk stripes, sharing the road with sparse futuristic traffic. Ahead looms a massive building with a distinctive sloped roof illuminated by vertical light strips, while the surrounding area features futuristic traffic signals and glowing building accents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered interior of a modern building out into the expansive, neon-drenched streets of a foggy metropolis. It begins by exiting through glass doors from a red-lit interior onto a landscaped sidewalk with recessed lighting, transitioning immediately into the damp, urban atmosphere. As the character runs forward, the scene opens up along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and holographic billboards, passing under the blue glow of a looming highway overpass. The movement then shifts across a tiled pedestrian walkway past a futuristic newsstand and vibrant pink neon advertisements that reflect off the rain-slicked pavement. Finally, the camera follows the character across a wide intersection marked with yellow stripes, moving toward a massive building with a sloped roof and vertical light strips that dominates the horizon.
